---
title: "Financial Times"
page-layout: article
---

# Financial Times

## Description

Digital news source covering global business, finance, economics, politics, and markets. Useful for current awareness and research on international business and economic issues.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy, News & Media
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events, Government & International Statistics
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events, Government & International Statistics

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?URL=https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-financial-times)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
